WHAT IS CITY NEXT?
CityNext is an initiative designed by Microsoft to help governments, businesses and citizens re imagine what 
is next for their cities.  The objective of CityNext is to empower people to create modern, safer, healthier, 
more educated and prosperous cities. 
Techno Brain has developed solutions that help counties and cities achieve “new with less”.

mIVR
Integr ated Voice 
Response System
for Healthcare
Our African solution for 
maternal health is our way of 
securing Africa’s FUTURE
mIVR is a fully automated Interactive Voice Response 
(IVR) based solution that enables healthcare institutions to automatically call their patients.  Primarily these calls are to expectant mothers through mobile technology and provide them with accur ate and up to date prenatal 
care information through a recorded message. 
By providing this service, expectant mothers get quality 
information and concrete steps to keep themselves and their babies healthy regardless of their access to health care facilities.• Automated operations to make monthly calls and 
feed information to expectant mothers
• Seamless interfacing with third party databases
• Ability to obtain real time and updated information to 
provide reliable service
• Impr ove productivity with comprehensive reports
